name: PWM Generator
description: Simple pulse-width modulator. Counter-compare approach with parameterizable resolution. Useful for motor control, LED dimming, and DAC approximation.
author: aazhi-ip-lib contributors
usage_note: PWM frequency = clk_freq / 2^WIDTH. For 50 MHz clk and WIDTH=8: ~195 kHz PWM. duty=0 → always low, duty=255 → almost always high.
